2606.30397.title: Model Predictive Current Control with Harmonic Correction for Single-Phase AC-DC EV Charging
2606.30397.paper_summary: The increasing integration of Electric Vehicles (EVs) has imposed a growing harmonic challenge on the power grid. For AC/DC Power Factor Correction (PFC) in single-phase On-Board Chargers (OBCs), Model Predictive Current Control (MPCC) improves the current quality by predicting and tracking the inductor current. However, finite control set MPCC selects switching states, resulting in discrete control actions and a limited optimisation space. Moreover, the MPCC cost function based on instantaneous current tracking error has limited capability to compensate for low-order harmonic disturbances induced by dead time, control delay, and model parameter mismatch. This paper proposes a duty cycle predictive MPCC incorporating a real-time harmonic estimation reference. The proposed method dynamically estimates the low-order harmonic components of the input current and corrects the MPCC reference current, enabling continuous duty cycle control and targeted suppression of dominant low-order harmonics. Simulation results on a single-phase OBC demonstrate that the proposed duty cycle predictive MPCC reduces the steady-state current THD_i from 11.47% to 6.10% compared with the switching state predictive MPCC. With the harmonic reference, the THD_i is further reduced to 2.85%.
2606.30397.paper_summary_zh: 電動車（EV）的日益整合對電網造成了越來越大的諧波挑戰。對於單相車載充電器（OBC）的交流/直流功率因數校正（PFC），模型預測電流控制（MPCC）通過預測和跟蹤電感電流來改善電流質量。然而，有限控制集MPCC選擇開關狀態，導致離散控制行為和有限的優化空間。此外，基於瞬時電流跟蹤誤差的MPCC成本函數對於補償由死區時間、控制延遲和模型參數不匹配引起的低階諧波擾動的能力有限。本文提出了一種結合實時諧波估計參考的占空比預測MPCC。所提出的方法動態估計輸入電流的低階諧波分量並校正MPCC參考電流，使得能夠實現連續的占空比控制和針對主要低階諧波的針對性抑制。在單相OBC上的模擬結果顯示，與開關狀態預測MPCC相比，所提出的占空比預測MPCC將穩態電流THD_i從11.47%降低至6.10%。在諧波參考的情況下，THD_i進一步降低至2.85%。
2606.30397.author: Changhong Li et.al.
2606.30397.authors: Changhong Li, Bharathkumar Hegde, Biswajit Basu, Shreejith Shanker
